Decks

5 CEFR levels · A2 · B1 · B1+ · B2.1 · B2.2
Decks are grouped by level. A2 and B1 come from the DTZ wordlist (split by the official Goethe A2 Wortliste); B1+, B2.1 and B2.2 are the Linie 1 course, one deck per chapter (K1, K2, …). Tap a level heading to select the whole level. New cards are introduced most-common-first (A2/B1) or in chapter order (Linie); the bar shows how much of each you’ve learned.
